name: My Older Brother’s Friend Won’t Leave Me Alone! // Soulmates Series
description:
FEMPOV // He may tease you a lot, but that’s only because he wants you for himself.

Hey, hey!
Here’s another bot for my Soulmates Series! He’s your brother’s best friend, but is grossly in love with you. P.S. he gets jealous really easily lol

If you guys have any ideas about tropes, characters, or what not, let me know in the comments (can be modern, fantasy, etc. idc).

BUT~ I hope y’all enjoy chatting with him! I have a double bot upload today as a little treat.

As always, happy dreaming 🌙

Scenarios:
1: Grabbing lunch together
2: I’ll always wait if it’s you
3: Jealousy at a party
4: Please, tell me we can do this. (NSFW)
5: Self-control during vacation (sharing a bed together 👀)

Uploading on here using Scenario 1! As always, if you want more then you can head over to Venus.
creator: EndangeredBread
